mapper.select: SELECT summary_id, company_id, template_id, start_date, end_date, language, input_hash, health_level, summary_json, generated_at, generated_by FROM survey_ai_summaries WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND COALESCE(template_id, '') = COALESCE(#{templateId}, '') AND COALESCE(start_date, DATE '1970-01-01') = COALESCE(#{startDate}, DATE '1970-01-01') AND COALESCE(end_date, DATE '1970-01-01') = COALESCE(#{endDate}, DATE '1970-01-01') AND language = #{language} AND input_hash = #{inputHash} ORDER BY generated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO survey_ai_summaries ( summary_id, company_id, template_id, start_date, end_date, language, input_hash, health_level, summary_json, generated_at, generated_by ) VALUES ( #{summaryId}, #{companyId}, #{templateId}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{language}, #{inputHash}, #{healthLevel}, #{summaryJson}, #{generatedAt}, #{generatedBy} ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
